export_view.value:
Invoice Beta Revisions:

  • Invoice View & Print - misc styling updates

  • Invoice View & Print - add tax id

  • Invoice Email - attach Invoice PDF instead of excel

  • Invoice Creation - find tickets by date created or date status updated

  • Invoice Items - add additional columns (customer, claim number)

Features:

  • Purchase Order Item List - added "Pending Quantity" column which shows qty of items pending receipt on open purchase orders

  • Productivity Reports - add ticket status filter

  • Permission Customizations - added more specificity to inventory and report permissions so that actions are more customize-able

Bugfixes:

  • Check whether inventory item is editable - fix date comparison

  • Purchase Order - recover from save errors without losing form data

  • Ticket item tax calculation fix - bundled items taxed on cost basis, where inventory accounting method is average cost

  • Ticket Item price error - prevent null price

  • Dashboard Admin - fix issue with showing data for all locations in aggregate

  • Inventory Item edit-ability - fix date comparison that determines when an item in a terminal status is editable in some contexts

  • Ticket Invoice - warranty/disclaimer display fix so that it responds to the appropriate print settings.

  • Serial number validation - some quirks related to serial number validation have been resolved.

  • Announcement Emails - email creation for announcements would fail in some scenarios, but this should no longer be a problem.

  • Announcement List - sort descending by creation date

  • Location based permissions for tickets and purchase orders - fixed some loopholes where managers could view tickets/pos at other locations.

  • Tradein Ticket - attempting to add second device before hitting “continue” clears out the form on the first device <= FIXED
